overview: NuclearEdu is an advanced interactive educational platform covering nuclear science, atomic models, quantum mechanics, reactor physics, and radiation — with deep data, accurate formulas, and high-fidelity visualizations.
features: Proper KaTeX rendering for all equations and symbols across 50+ pages
Accurate nuclear data from NNDC, IAEA, and NIST sources
Complete Bethe-Weizsäcker, point kinetics, and reactor physics equations
Interactive visualizations for decay chains, quantum orbitals, and reactor simulations
Expanded glossary with 200+ terms and proper formatting
Nuclear notation rendered with correct superscript/subscript formatting
Comprehensive data tables for isotopes, cross-sections, and decay modes
